description: Cross-site scripting (XSS) vulnerability in the Language Icons module 6.x-2.x before 6.x-2.1 and 7.x-1.x before 7.x-1.0 for Drupal allows remote authenticated users with administer languages permissions to inject arbitrary web script or HTML via unspecified vectors.
